data.title: Former Blockchain Executive Jamie Selway Joins SEC as Director of Trading and Markets
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) announced several important personnel appointments, including Jamie Selway, former global head of institutional markets at Blockchain.com, who will serve as director of the SEC's Trading and Markets Division. In addition, Brian Daly, a law firm partner with experience in the crypto field, will also join to be in charge of the investment management department. This move comes as the U.S. legislature is considering the CLARITY Act, which aims to clarify the regulatory authority of the SEC and CFTC in the field of digital assets. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Fidelity Files for Solana Spot ETF with Staking Option
data.description: According to BlockBeats, market reports indicate that asset management giant and ETF issuer Fidelity has submitted an S-1 filing for a Solana spot ETF. Notably, this ETF includes a staking option for users.

data.title: Analysis: ETH price drops to $2,100 or becomes a good opportunity for layout
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Technical graphics and on-chain data show that ETH's decline in the $2,100 to $2,200 range should be seen as a strategic buying opportunity. Although ETH has recently fallen from a high of $2,879 to $2,433, the stable rising channel pattern is still maintained, and the current price is hovering below $2,600.
Glassnode data shows that the spot ETH ETF has a net inflow of 154,000 ETH this week, nearly five times the weekly average. BlackRock has also increased its holdings through its ETH trust, and its holdings have reached 1.51 million ETH, with a total value of approximately $3.87 billion. At the same time, Token Terminal data shows that the scale of tokenized asset management on Ethereum has exceeded $5 billion, reflecting the growing confidence of institutions in it as a financial infrastructure.
Combined with seasonal pullbacks and expectations for year-end investment strategies, multiple signals support a breakthrough rise in ETH at the end of 2025. The institutionalization trend is gradually pushing ETH into the mainstream investment market. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: U.S. Stock Market Sees Weekly Decline Amid Sector Gains
data.description:
According to PANews, the U.S. stock market closed on Friday with notable declines across major indices. The Dow Jones Industrial Average fell by 1.79% on the day, contributing to a weekly loss of 1.32%. The S&P 500 Index decreased by 1.13%, ending the week down 0.39%, while the Nasdaq Composite dropped 1.30%, resulting in a weekly decline of 0.63%.

Despite the overall market downturn, the energy and defense sectors showed resilience. Houston Energy experienced a significant surge, rising over 117.79%, and U.S. Energy saw an increase of 55.63%. Additionally, Tesla (TSLA.O) shares rose by 1.94%.

data.title: Polkadot Eyes Bitcoin Reserve Plan Using 501K DOT in Yearlong tBTC Strategy
data.description:
The Polkadot community members have proposed a strategic initiative to create a Bitcoin reserve using the network’s treasury funds. The plan suggests converting 501,000 DOT into tBTC over one year through an automated dollar-cost averaging system. More so, the accumulated tBTC would be deployed in DeFi liquidity pools using a non-custodial bridge
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/06/13/polkadot-eyes-bitcoin-reserve-plan-using-501k-dot-in-yearlong-tbtc-strategy/
